name: Browser Use Agent Browserstation Smoke
description: Validate the browser-use-agent runtime by running a Browserstation-backed browser session against example.com.

document.name: browser-use-agent-browserstation-smoke
document.title: Browser Use Agent Browserstation Smoke
document.summary: Provision an ephemeral browser-use-agent runtime session and verify it can navigate to example.com through Browserstation.

input.promptPlaceholder: Optionally override the default browser task.

with.stopCondition: Stop only after the final response includes BROWSER USE VALIDATED and both the page title and final URL.
with.prompt: {{trigger.prompt || "Open https://example.com in the live browser. Wait for the page to finish loading. Return the exact page title and the final URL. End with BROWSER USE VALIDATED."}}

agentConfig.name: browser-use-agent-browserstation-smoke
instructions: Use the browser-use runtime with the Browserstation-backed browser for navigation.
Return the exact page title and final URL in the final answer.
